# For build in directory: /home/daniel/ncs/330rc2/nrf/samples/openthread/coap_client/build/coap_client
# It was generated by CMake: /home/daniel/ncs/toolchains/911f4c5c26/usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries

OT_RCP:BOOL=ON

//set max RCP restoration count
OT_RCP_RESTORATION_MAX_COUNT:STRING=

//set RCP TX wait TIME in seconds
OT_RCP_TX_WAIT_TIME_SECS:STRING=

//Enable Thread Certification Reference Device
OT_REFERENCE_DEVICE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Service entries in Thread Network Data
OT_SERVICE:BOOL=OFF

//Enable volatile-only storage of settings
OT_SETTINGS_RAM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SLAAC
OT_SLAAC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SNTP Client support
OT_SNTP_CLIENT:BOOL=OFF

//set vendor hook header file for Spinel
OT_SPINEL_VENDOR_HOOK_HEADER:STRING=

//set vendor hook source file for Spinel
OT_SPINEL_VENDOR_HOOK_SOURCE:STRING=

//Enable SRP Server Advertising Proxy support
OT_SRP_ADV_PROXY:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SRP Client support
OT_SRP_CLIENT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable SRP Server support
OT_SRP_SERVER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable TCP support
OT_TCP:BOOL=OFF

//Thread stack version
OT_THREAD_VERSION:STRING=1.4

//Enable the time synchronization service feature
OT_TIME_SYNC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable TREL radio link for Thread over Infrastructure feature
OT_TREL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable tx beacon payload support
OT_TX_BEACON_PAYLOAD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable tx queue statistics
OT_TX_QUEUE_STATS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable UDP forward feature
OT_UDP_FORWARD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable support for tracking OpenThread instance's uptime
OT_UPTIME:BOOL=ON

//specify a C++ source file built as part of OpenThread core library
OT_VENDOR_EXTENSION:STRING=

//set the vendor model config
OT_VENDOR_MODEL:STRING=

//set the vendor name config
OT_VENDOR_NAME:STRING=

//set the vendor sw version config
OT_VENDOR_SW_VERSION:STRING=

//Verhoeff checksum
OT_VERHOEFF_CHECKSUM:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Wake-up Coordinator role
OT_WAKEUP_COORDINATOR:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Wake-up End Device role
OT_WAKEUP_END_DEVICE:BOOL=OFF
